episodes.title: Manson (1973) | Welcome To The Family Cult
episodes.description:
https://www.programmedtokill.net/charles-manson

Documentary on Charles Manson and his family. Has a number of insightful interviews with many family members most notably Squeaky and Sandy (Blue and Red). There is also a history of Manson from his birth to the family formation to the Tate/La Bianca murders. Plenty of footage of the family playing at Spahn Ranch.

Title: Manson
Director: Robert Hendrickson, Laurence Merrick
Writers: Joan Huntington, Laurence Merrick
Starring: Bobby Beausoleil, Mary Brunner, Vincent Bugliosi, Bruce Davis, Lynette 'Squeaky' Fromme, Sandra Good, Steve Grogan, Ronnie Howard, Charles Manson, Jesse Pearson, Phil Phillips, Nancy Pitman, Brooks Poston, Catherine Share, George Spahn, Paul Watkins

Year Released: 1973

episodes.title: 1987 News Coverage of the Finders Case (Full Segments) Programmed To Kill/Satanic Cover Up Part 462
episodes.description:
Rare and never-before-seen on the Internet original 1987 news broadcast segments covering the Finders cult case in Tallahassee, Florida.

This video presents authentic archival television news footage from 1987, documenting how local and national media originally reported on the Finders cult investigation at the time it unfolded. These broadcasts provide important historical context, showing what the public was told—and how the case was framed—during the initial stages of the investigation.

The Finders cult case has remained one of the most controversial and debated cult investigations in modern American history. Decades later, much of the original media coverage has been difficult to locate or completely unavailable. The footage shown here has been preserved and compiled to ensure these historical records are not lost.

Religious movement, Washington D.C., Marion Pettie, Central Intelligence Agency, Child Abuse, Douglas Edward Ammerman, James Michael Holwell, Satanic Cult, U.S. Customs Service, Brainwashing Techniques, Robert Gardner Terrell, Child Molesting, Satanic Ritual Abuse, Goat, Florida, Scott Hunt, Margaret Chamberlain, Scott Dignam, 

This video discusses sensitive historical material involving allegations and investigations.
